tasks.prompt: Make Jinja2Templates use Jinja2's select_autoescape default when creating an environment from a template directory, while preserving caller-supplied environments and adding tests for escaping behavior.

Change SessionMiddleware so it can distinguish session access from mutation, avoid sending Set-Cookie for unchanged sessions, preserve cookie clearing behavior, and add regression coverage for concurrent/read-only session flows.

Update CORSMiddleware so simple responses with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=True echo the explicit request Origin instead of '*', matching preflight behavior and credentialed CORS requirements.
